faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Rego Park range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Rego Park?
faqs.answer: Rego Park residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, carpenter ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older buildings. Our technicians identify the specific species to apply the most effective treatment.
